description: A guest sends an email after an event complaining about long lines for the restrooms.

nodes.task_description: Log the guest's feedback in the customer feedback system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new feedback record and categorizes it as 'Facility/Cleanliness'.

nodes.task_description: Draft a response to the guest, thanking them for their feedback and acknowledging their concern.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a polite and empathetic response.

nodes.task_description: Forward the feedback to the venue operations manager for their awareness and review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a notification to the operations manager.
